slides.eyebrow: Divhazwakale ya Giredi ya 11 - Vuimo ha FET
slides.title: Dzi-Nationalism: Afurika Tshipembe, Middle East na Afurika
slides.lead: U vhambedza mivhuya miṋa ya Nationalism - Nationalism ya Vhaafrikaner na ya Vhaafurika ngei Afurika Tshipembe, na Zionism na Nationalism ya Vhaarabu ngei Middle East - u vhudzisa uri Nationalism i nga kona hani u ṱanganya vhathu na u fhandekanya shango.

media.alt: Mibendela miṋa yo pfanyekiswaho i tshi bva kha guluvhu ya vhukati, i imela mivhuya miṋa ya Nationalism ine ya khou vhambedzwa.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 180' role='img'><rect width='320' height='180' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='160' cy='90' r='34' fill='#7a8b5a'/><circle cx='160' cy='90' r='34' fill='none' stroke='#4f5d3a' stroke-width='2'/><g stroke='#5a4a2a' stroke-width='3'><line x1='160' y1='90' x2='60' y2='34'/><line x1='160' y1='90' x2='262' y2='34'/><line x1='160' y1='90' x2='60' y2='150'/><line x1='160' y1='90' x2='262' y2='150'/></g><rect x='40' y='22' width='34' height='22' fill='#e8a13a'/><rect x='246' y='22' width='34' height='22' fill='#1f3a8a'/><rect x='40' y='140' width='34' height='22' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='246' y='140' width='34' height='22' fill='#2f5233'/></svg>

slides.notes: Vhea yunithi yoṱhe sa ngudo ya vhambedzo, hu si mafhungo maṋa o fhambanaho. Bulani mbudziso khulwane ya ḓivhazwakale: ndi ngani Nationalism - maanḓa ane a ṋea vhathu vhuḓiimiswa, u ḓihudza na mbofholowo - a tshi kovhekanya lunzhi vhathu na u ḓisa khani? Sumbedzani vhupfumedzo: u thoma ni ṱalusa Nationalism, ni sedze zwiitea zwivhili zwa Afurika Tshipembe (Vhaafrikaner na Vhaafurika), ni sedze zwiitea zwivhili zwa Middle East (Zionism na Nationalism ya Vhaarabu), ni tshi vhambedza ni tshi khou ya phanḓa. Humbudzani vhagudiswa uri iṅwe ya iyi ḓivhazwakale i khou hanedziswa vhukuma nahone i kha ḓi vhaisa mbilu na ṋamusi, ngauralo ri shumisa zwiko nga vhulapfu na nga ṱhonifho.

slides.title: Nationalism ndi mini?
slides.lead: Nationalism ndi lutendo lwa uri tshigwada tsha vhathu vhane vha vha na vhuḓiimiswa vhu fanaho vha vhumba 'lushaka' ḽine ḽa fanela u vha na muvhuso waḽo, u fulufhedzea na u ḓivhusa.

blocks.text: **Lushaka** ndi *tshitshavha tsho humbulelwaho* (imagined community): miraḓo yaḽo a i nga ṱangani na vhunzhi ha vhadzulapo nga vhabe vhaḽo, fhedzi vha ḓipfa vhe vhathihi. **Nationalism** i shandukisa eneo maḓipfele a vha ṱhoḓea ya politiki - ndugelo ya u ḓivhusa kha muvhuso wavho.

Vhaḓivhazwakale kanzhi vha fhambanya mifuda mivhili. **Civic nationalism** (Nationalism ya vhudzulapo) i ṱalusa lushaka nga vhudzulapo, milayo na ndeme zwo fanaho, ngauralo muṅwe na muṅwe a nga dzhena khayo. **Ethnic nationalism** (Nationalism ya mutupo) i ṱalusa lushaka nga mutupo, luambo, vhurabeli kana mvelele zwo fanaho, zwine zwa nga kovhekanya vha nnḓa. Mivhuya minzhi ya vhukuma i ṱanganya mifuda yeneyi mivhili.

items: Kanzhi i ḓisendeka kha luambo, vhurabeli, ḓivhazwakale kana muhumbulo wa vhomakhulukuku vho fanaho.
Kanzhi i vuselelwa kana ya khwaṱhiswa nga vhuṱungu ho fanaho - u kundwa, vhushai, tshiṱalulo kana vhuvhusi ha vhannḓa.
I fhaṱa vhuthihi nga u ṱalusa 'riṋe', fhedzi kha u ita nga u ralo i dovha ya ṱalusa 'vhoṱhavho'.

slides.notes: Ṋeani vhagudiswa maipfi a musaukanyo ane vha ḓo a shumisa kha yunithi yoṱhe: lushaka, Nationalism, u ḓivhusa, civic khathihi na ethnic nationalism, na muhumbulo wa Benedict Anderson wa 'tshitshavha tsho humbulelwaho'. Ombedzelani uri Nationalism a si zwavhuḓi fhedzi kana zwivhi fhedzi - yo ṱutshela mbofholowo ya u lwa na vhukoloni nahone ya ṱutshela u kovhekanya na apartheid. Vhukoni vhu funzwaho ndi vhambedzo: muhumbulo muthihi, zwiimo zwo fhambanaho.

slides.title: Mbudziso ṱhanu dza u vhudzisa kha Nationalism iṅwe na iṅwe
slides.lead: Shumisani lenzi ḽithihi kha muvhuya muṅwe na muṅwe uri ni kone u vha vhambedza nga u linganela.

blocks.heading: Ndi nnyi?
blocks.text: Ndi nnyi ane a vhalwa sa tshipiḓa tsha lushaka - nahone ndi nnyi a siiwaho nnḓa?

blocks.heading: Ndi ngani zwino?
blocks.text: Ndi vhuṱungu kana khombo ifhio ye ya vusa muvhuya?

blocks.heading: Nga nḓila-ḓe?
blocks.text: Vharangaphanḓa vho kuvhanganya hani vhathu - mvelele, vhurabeli, zwiimiswa, nyito ya vhathu vhanzhi?

blocks.heading: Mavu?
blocks.text: Ndi ḽifhio shango ḽe vha ḽi ambela, nahone ndi nnyi muṅwe we a ḽi ambela?

blocks.heading: Mvelelo?
blocks.text: Yo ḓisa mbofholowo, vhulanga, khani - kana zwoṱhe zwiraru?

slides.notes: Iyi ndi fureimiweke ya vhambedzo ine vhagudiswa vha fanela u i shumisa kha Nationalism ya Vhaafrikaner, Nationalism ya Vhaafurika, Zionism na Nationalism ya Vhaarabu nga u tevhekana. Vha ṱuṱuwedzeni uri vha vhee girithi ya vhambedzo kha bugu dzavho ya khoḽamu ṱhanu idzi. Sumbedzani uri mbudziso ya 'Mavu?' ndi hune zwiitea zwivhili zwa vha zwa vhuṱungu: kha Afurika Tshipembe na kha Israel/Palestine, dzi-Nationalism mbili dzo ambela shango ḽithihi.

slides.title: Nationalism ya Vhaafrikaner: u kundwa, vhushai na u vusuluswa
slides.lead: Nationalism ya Vhaafrikaner yo bva kha u shonisiwa kha Nndwa ya Afurika Tshipembe (South African War, 1899-1902) na vhushai he Vhaafrikaner vhanzhi vha sedzana naho nga murahu.

blocks.text: U kundwa nga Britain, lufu lwa vhafumakadzi na vhana kha dzikamba dza concentration camps, na u xela ha dzirephabuliki dza Maburu (Boer republics) zwo sia Vhaafrikaner vhanzhi vha tshi pfa uri volk yavho (vhathu) yo vha khomboni. Miṅwahani ya mahumi ya tevhelaho, zwigidi zwa vhathu zwa vha 'vhatshena vha vhushai' (poor whites), vha ṱuṱuwedzwa vha bva mavuni vha ya miḓoroboni.

Vharangaphanḓa vho shumisa **luambo, vhurabeli na ḓivhazwakale** u fhaṱulula u ḓihudza. Luambo lwa Afrikaans lwo dzudzanywa lwa khwinifhadzwa; Dutch Reformed Church (Kereke ya Dutch Reformed) yo ombedzela Vhaafrikaner sa vhathu vho nangiwaho; nahone mafhungo a Great Trek o vha ngano ya mathomo ya vhathu vhe vha vha vha tshi khou lwela mbofholowo.

items: **Afrikaner Broederbond** (yo thomiwaho nga 1918) yo fhaṱa netiweke ya tshiphiri u bvisela phanḓa madzangalelo a Vhaafrikaner kha politiki, bindu na mvelele.
Zwiimiswa zwa mvelele na tshigwada tsha miṅwaha ya ḓana (centenary) ya 1938 ya Great Trek zwo vusa maḓipfele a vhathu vhanzhi.
**National Party** yo shandukisa heḽi vhuḓiimiswa ḽa vha nyito ya u lwela maanḓa a muvhuso.

media.alt: Tshifanyiso tsha wago ya dzikholomo fhasi ha ḓuvha ḽi tshi ṱavha, tshi elela Great Trek ye ya shumiswa sa tshiga tsha Nationalism.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='170' cy='58' r='26' fill='#e8a13a'/><rect y='118' width='240' height='42' fill='#c8b89a'/><g fill='#5a4a2a'><rect x='60' y='92' width='70' height='24'/><path d='M60 92 l14 -16 h44 l12 16 Z'/></g><circle cx='74' cy='120' r='12' fill='none' stroke='#5a4a2a' stroke-width='4'/><circle cx='120' cy='120' r='12' fill='none' stroke='#5a4a2a' stroke-width='4'/><line x1='130' y1='104' x2='168' y2='100' stroke='#5a4a2a' stroke-width='3'/></svg>

slides.notes: Ṱalutshedzani uri maḓipfele a u vha muvhaiwa o shandukiselwa hani kha mbekanyamushumo ya politiki. Tshishumiswa tsha ndeme: vhuṱungu (u kundwa, vhushai ha vhatshena) khathihi na u kuvhanganya nga mvelele (luambo, kereke, ngano ya ḓivhazwakale, Broederbond) zwi ita muvhuya wa vhathu vhanzhi. Tshigwada tsha miṅwaha ya ḓana tsha Great Trek tsha 1938 ndi tsumbo yavhuḓi ya sialala ḽo itwaho. [SME] Farani nga vhulondoloti na nga u tea mihumbulo ya concentration camps; ndi ya ngoho kha ḓivhazwakale nahone yo shumiswa nga murahu kha politiki. Sumbedzani uri iyi ndi ethnic nationalism yo ṱaluswaho nga mutupo, luambo na vhurabeli.

slides.title: 1948: Nationalism ya Vhaafrikaner i fara muvhuso
slides.lead: Nga 1948 National Party yo kunda maanḓa nahone ya shandukisa Nationalism ya Vhaafrikaner ya vha mbekanyamaitele ya tshiofisi ya apartheid.

blocks.text: I tshi rangwa phanḓa nga **D.F. Malan**, National Party yo kunda khetho ya 1948 ya vhatshena fhedzi nga fulufhedziso ḽa *apartheid* ('u fhandekanya'). Zwino Nationalism ya Vhaafrikaner yo langa muvhuso nahone ya u shumisa u tsireledza mishumo, luambo na maanḓa a Vhaafrikaner - na u kombetshedza vhulanga ha vhatshena kha vhunzhi ha vhathu vhatswu.

items: Muvhuso wo engedza pfunzo ya Afrikaans, tshumelo ya muvhuso na indasitiri ya muvhuso u alusa Vhaafrikaner.
Milayo ya apartheid yo kovha vhathu nga muvhala nahone ya vhea maanḓa na pfarelo dzavhuḓi kha vhatshena fhedzi.
Iyi ndi tsumbo ya Nationalism ye ya wana u ḓivhusa kha tshigwada tshithihi nga u tshi hanela vhaṅwe.

media.alt: Girafu ya mahwaṱi i tshi gonya phanḓa ha muḓi wa muvhuso, i sumbedza tshigwada tshithihi tshi tshi wana maanḓa nga khombo ya vhaṅwe.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='30' y='36' width='120' height='40' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M54 36 q36 -22 72 0 Z' fill='#b7a98d'/><rect x='42' y='48' width='8' height='28' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='130' y='48' width='8' height='28' fill='#f4efe6'/><g fill='#2f5233'><rect x='160' y='108' width='16' height='28'/><rect x='182' y='88' width='16' height='48'/><rect x='204' y='60' width='16' height='76'/></g><rect x='28' y='136' width='196' height='6' fill='#5a4a2a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Sumbedzani muhumbulo wa musaukanyo nga vhukhwaṱha: Nationalism ya Vhaafrikaner yo 'bvelela' nga 1948, fhedzi u bvelela hayo ho vha tsikeledzo ya vhaṅwe vhathu. Hezwi zwi vhea khani yo livhaho na Nationalism ya Vhaafurika. Vhuyani kha fureimiweke: Ndi nnyi we a katelwa? (Vhaafrikaner, nga murahu vhatshena.) Ndi nnyi we a siiwa nnḓa? (Vhunzhi ha vhathu vhatswu.) Ṱhogomelani uri apartheid nga luṅwe yo vha proyeke ya u sika mishumo na u alusa Vhaafrikaner vha vhushai, zwine zwa thusa u ṱalutshedza uri ndi ngani yo vha i tshi funwa kha tshitshavha tshayo.

slides.title: Nationalism ya Vhaafurika: vhuthihi u lwa na u kovhekanywa
slides.lead: Nationalism ya Vhaafurika yo hula sa phindulo kha u kundwa nga nndwa, u xela ha mavu na u kovhekanywa kha Union of South Africa ye ya vhumbwa nga 1910.

blocks.text: Union of South Africa (1910) yo ṱanganya vhatshena fhedzi ya valela Vhaafurika nnḓa ha maanḓa a politiki. Nga 1912 vharangaphanḓa vha Vhaafurika vho funzeaho vho thoma **South African Native National Congress** - ye ya rentwa dzina ya vha **African National Congress (ANC)** nga 1923 - u ṱanganya Vhaafurika u pfuka mikano ya mitupo na ya vhupo na u ṱoḓa pfanelo kha lushaka luthihi lwo fanaho.

**1913 Natives Land Act**, we wa vhulungela vhatshena vhunzhi ha mavu a shango, wo sumbedza uri ndi ngani vhuthihi ho vha vhu tshi ṱoḓea nga u ṱavhanya. Nationalism ya Vhaafurika ya kale yo vha yo dzikaho: yo shumisa dzikhalelo (petitions), thumelo (deputations) na mulayo u humbela u katelwa.

items: Yo vha i tshi lwela u kunda u fhandekana ha mitupo na u fhaṱa lushaka luthihi lwa Vhaafurika, nga murahu lwa Afurika Tshipembe lu si na tshiṱalulo tsha muvhala (non-racial).
Yo ṱalusa lushaka nga vhudzulapo na pfanelo zwo fanaho - vhono ha civic vhukuma.
Nḓila dzayo dza u thoma dzo vha dza ndayotewa (constitutional); u sinyuwa ho ḓo i sudzulusela kha nyito ya vhathu vhanzhi nga murahu.

media.alt: Zwifanyiso zwinzhi zwiṱuku zwa zwivhumbeo zwo fhambanaho zwi tshi fara zwanḓa u vhumba tshiḓinngo tshithihi, zwi imela vhuthihi vhukati ha zwigwada.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><g fill='#2f5233'><circle cx='120' cy='40' r='11'/><circle cx='176' cy='62' r='11'/><circle cx='176' cy='108' r='11'/><circle cx='120' cy='130' r='11'/><circle cx='64' cy='108' r='11'/><circle cx='64' cy='62' r='11'/></g><circle cx='120' cy='85' r='52' fill='none' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4' stroke-dasharray='6 6'/></svg>

slides.notes: Vhambedzani muhumbulo wa u thoma na Nationalism ya Vhaafrikaner: Nationalism ya Vhaafurika yo ṱoḓa u fhaṱa vhuthihi vhukati ha zwigwada zwinzhi zwa mitupo ya Vhaafurika (Vhazulu, Vhaxhosa, Vhasuthu na vhaṅwe) zwauri vha lwe na muvhuso we wa vha kovhekanya. Ombedzelani vhono ha civic ho katelaho vhoṱhe - ANC mafheleloni yo livha kha u sa vha na tshiṱalulo tsha muvhala. Ṱhogomelani u sa tendelana hune yunithi ya dzula i tshi vhuya khaho: dzi-Nationalism mbili dza Afurika Tshipembe, iṅwe i tshi ṱoḓa vhulanga, iṅwe i tshi ṱoḓa u katelwa, dzi tshi kwamana nga mavu maṅwe.

slides.title: Murafho muswa: ANC Youth League
slides.lead: Nga vho-1940s murafho wa vhaswa wo ṱoḓa Nationalism ya Vhaafurika yo tsivhaho, yo thewaho kha vhathu vhanzhi.

blocks.text: Vho sinyuwa nga miṅwaha ya mahumi ya dzikhalelo dzo dzikaho, vharangaphanḓa vha vhaswa vho vhumba **ANC Youth League** nga 1944. Muphuresidennde wayo wa u thoma, **Anton Lembede**, o amba uri Vhaafurika vha fanela u ḓivhofholola nga u ḓihudza, u ḓisendeka na u ḓidzudzanya sa vhathu vhanzhi u fhira u lindela vhulenda ha vhatshena.
Afurika ndi shango ḽa munna mutswu... Vhaafurika ndi vhathihi. Kha mitupo yo fhambanaho hu tea u bvelela lushaka luthihi lwo fanaho.
blocks.cite: Anton Lembede, 'Some Basic Principles of African Nationalism', 1945

items: Programme of Action ya Youth League ya 1949 yo ṱanganedza dzikhukhulo (strikes), u hana u renga (boycotts) na u sa thetshelesa mulayo nga u ḓifara (civil disobedience).
Vhathu vha ngaho Nelson Mandela, Walter Sisulu na Oliver Tambo vho ṱanḓavhuwa kha zwiṱaha zwayo.
Iyi Nationalism ya Vhaafurika yo khwaṱhaho yo ḓo ranga phanḓa nndwa ya vhathu vhanzhi ya u lwa na apartheid nga vho-1950s.

slides.notes: Shumisani mubulo wa Lembede u sumbedza mbilu ya maḓipfele ya Nationalism ya Vhaafurika - u ḓisendeka na vhuthihi u pfuka mikano ya mitupo - ni tshi ṱhogomela uri sialala ḽihulwane ḽa ANC ḽo dovha ḽa livha kha u sa vha na tshiṱalulo tsha muvhala (non-racialism, nga murahu Freedom Charter). [SME] Africanism ya Lembede yo vha luvhambo luthihi; ANC yo vha na nyambedzano vhukati ha Africanism yo valaho na non-racialism yo katelaho, ye nga murahu ya bveledza u ḓikhethekanya ha PAC (1959). Vhulungani u fhambana: Nationalism ya Vhaafurika yo vha i si ya lwothe. Kwamani phanḓa: uyu murafho u ranga phanḓa Defiance Campaign ye Giredi ya 9 ya i dzhia.

slides.title: Dzi-Nationalism mbili, shango ḽithihi
slides.lead: Nationalism ya Vhaafrikaner na ya Vhaafurika dzo hula dzo sedzana, iṅwe i tshi vhumba iṅwe.

items: Yo thewa kha u kundwa nga Britain na vhushai ha vhatshena.
Ethnic: yo ṱaluswa nga mutupo, Afrikaans na kereke.
Ndivho: u ḓivhusa na u tsireledzwa ha volk ya Vhaafrikaner.
Yo kunda muvhuso nga 1948 ya fhaṱa apartheid.
Yo wana mbofholowo yayo nga u langa vhaṅwe.
Yo thewa kha u kundwa nga nndwa, u xela ha mavu na u kovhekanywa.
Ndivho ya civic: u ṱanganya zwigwada zwinzhi kha lushaka luthihi.
Ndivho: pfanelo dzo linganaho na u ḓivhusa ha vhunzhi.
Yo khwaṱhiswa ya vha nndwa ya vhathu vhanzhi u bva vho-1940s-50s.
Yo ṱoḓa mbofholowo nga u katela, hu si nga vhulanga.

slides.notes: Imani afha ni ite ngudo ya vhambedzo yo dzudzanywaho. Vhudzisani vhagudiswa uri vha topole u fana (dzoṱhe dzo shumisa ḓivhazwakale, mvelele na u ḓidzudzanya u kuvhanganya; dzoṱhe dzo ṱoḓa u ḓivhusa) na u fhambana (iṅwe yo vala nahone i tshi vhusa, iṅwe yo katela nahone yo siiwa nnḓa). Ombedzelani u kwamana: tsikeledzo ya Nationalism ya Vhaafrikaner yo khwaṱhisa Nationalism ya Vhaafurika, nahone khanedzo ya Vhaafurika yo khwaṱhisa Nationalism ya Vhaafrikaner. Uku u vhumbana ndi ṱhalukanyo ya nṱha ya ndeme kha FET.

slides.title: Zionism: hayani ha vhathu vha Vhayuda
slides.lead: Zionism yo vha muvhuya wa Nationalism we wa vhidzelela hayani ha Vhayuda, zwihulwane sa phindulo kha maḓana a miṅwaha a u tovholwa ngei Yuropa.

blocks.text: Vha tshi sedzana na anti-Semitism ya khakhathi - dzipogrom kha Muvhuso Muhulwane wa Russia na Dreyfus Affair ngei France - **Theodor Herzl** o amba kha *The Jewish State* (1896) uri Vhayuda vha nga vha na tsireledzo fhedzi arali vhe na muvhuso wavho. First Zionist Congress yo ṱangana ngei Basel nga 1897, nahone u pfulusela ha Vhayuda Palestine ha engedzea.

Kha **Balfour Declaration (1917)** Britain yo ḓivhadza thikhedzo ya 'hayani ha lushaka ya vhathu vha Vhayuda' ngei Palestine - shango ḽe nga tshenetsho tshifhinga ḽo vha ḽi ḽa Vhaarabu vhukuma. Britain yo vhusa Palestine nga fhasi ha mandeti ya League of Nations nga murahu ha 1920, nahone u sa pfana vhukati ha zwitshavha zwa Vhayuda na Vhaarabu ha engedzea.

items: Zionism yo ṱanganya vhuḓiimiswa ha mutupo na ha vhurabeli na ṱhoḓea ya musalauno ya u vha na muvhuso.
Yo ṱutshelwa nga u tovholwa ha ngoho na ho vhulahaho, zwihulwanesa Holocaust ya 1941-1945.
Fhedzi shango ḽe ya ḽi ambela ḽo vha ḽi tshee hayani ha vhadzulapo vha Vhaarabu vhe vha vha vha na maḓipfele avho a lushaka.

media.alt: Ṋaḽedzi ya mbonzhe ṱhanu na nthihi nṱha ha mukano wa ḽiṱaḓulu wo pfanyekiswaho, i imela nyimbelelo ya Zionism ya hayani ha Vhayuda.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='118' width='240' height='42' fill='#c8b89a'/><g fill='none' stroke='#1f3a8a' stroke-width='6' stroke-linejoin='round'><path d='M120 34 L146 94 L86 58 L154 58 L94 94 Z'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Sumbedzani Zionism sa phindulo kha u tovholwa ha ngoho, ho vhulahaho, ho guma nga Holocaust - vhagudiswa vha fanela u pfesesa uri ndi ngani Vhayuda vhanzhi vho phetha uri vha ṱoḓa muvhuso wavho. Nga tshifhinga tshithihi, ni vhe khagala nga zwithu zwa ngoho uri Palestine yo vha yo no dzula vhathu, zwihulwane Vhaarabu, ngauralo shango ḽithihi ḽo vha ḽi na dziambelo mbili. [SME] Iyi ndi ḓivhazwakale i pfesesaho vhukuma ye ya hanedziswa; dzulani kha zwithu zwo tendelanwaho nga vhathu vhanzhi (Herzl, Basel 1897, Balfour 1917, British Mandate) ni iledze u dzhia sia. Sumbedzani u sengulusa zwiko: Balfour Declaration yo dovha ya fulufhedzisa u sa tshinya pfanelo dza 'zwitshavha zwi si zwa Vhayuda zwo no vhaho hone'.

slides.title: 1948: mbofholowo na khombo khulwane
slides.lead: Tshiitea tshithihi tsha 1948 tshi humbulwa nga tshaka mbili nga nḓila dzo lwaho.

blocks.text: Nga murahu ha Holocaust na khani i tshi hula, United Nations yo vouta nga 1947 u kovha Palestine kha muvhuso wa Vhayuda na wa Vhaarabu. Nga **14 May 1948** vharangaphanḓa vha Vhayuda vho ḓivhadza **State of Israel**. Nndwa na mivhuso ya Vhaarabu ya vhusendedzani ya tevhela nga u ṱavhanya.

Vha-Israel vha humbula 1948 sa **War of Independence** (Nndwa ya Mbofholowo) yavho - u wanwa ha hayani ho tsireledzeaho. Vha-Palestine vha i humbula sa **Nakba** ('khombo khulwane'): tshivhalo tshi linganaho na 700 000 tsha Vhaarabu vha Palestine vho shavha kana vha pandelwa nahone a vho ngo tendelwa u vhuya. Shango ḽithihi, tshaka mbili, mihumbulo mivhili i sa tendelaniho.

items: Kha lushaka luthihi, 1948 ho amba u ḓivhusa na u tshila.
Kha luṅwe, ho amba u dzhielwa zwithu na vhupfululi.
Iyi khani i songo tandululwaho i kha ḓi vhumba Middle East na ṋamusi.

media.alt: Shango ḽithihi ḽo fhandekanywaho nga mutalo wo imaho, sia ḽithihi ḽi tshi gonya ḽiṅwe ḽi tshi ṱuwa, zwi imela mihumbulo mivhili yo lwaho ya 1948.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='16' y='30' width='96' height='100' fill='#a8bcae'/><rect x='128' y='30' width='96' height='100' fill='#d8c6a8'/><rect x='116' y='24' width='8' height='112' fill='#8a1f1f'/><g fill='#1f3a8a'><path d='M64 60 L74 84 L54 70 L86 70 L66 84 Z'/></g><g fill='#5a4a2a'><circle cx='160' cy='72' r='7'/><rect x='153' y='80' width='14' height='24'/><path d='M172 88 h22 l-8 -8 v16 Z'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Iyi ndi sileidi i pfesesaho vhukuma kha deke; i funzeni sa ngudo ya kuvhonele na muhumbulo wa ḓivhazwakale. Sumbedzani madzina oṱhe mavhili a 1948 o sedzana ni songo a vhea nga vhuimo, ni shumise maambele a 'i humbulwa sa'. [SME] Tshivhalo na zwiitisi zwa u shavha ha Vha-Palestine zwi khou hanedziswa nga ngoho nga vhaḓivhazwakale (u shavha kana u pandelwa); sumbedzani tshivhalo tsha ~700 000 sa tshiestimeithi ni ṱhogomele nyambedzano. Ndivho ya u funza ndi vhuthu na u sengulusa zwiko: tshiitea tshithihi tsho ḓaṱwaho tshi bveledza mafhungo mavhili a lushaka. Ranganani nyambedzano yo dzikaho, ya ṱhonifho, ni thome nga u vhea milayo.

slides.title: Nationalism ya Vhaarabu: vhuthihi na mbofholowo
slides.lead: Nationalism ya Vhaarabu yo ṱoḓa u vhofholola vhathu vha ambaho Luarabu kha vhuvhusi ha vhannḓa nahone, kha vhaṅwe, u vha ṱanganya kha lushaka luthihi.

blocks.text: Musi Ottoman Empire i tshi wa nga murahu ha Nndwa ya Shango ya u Thoma (World War I), mavu a Vhaarabu o kovhiwa kha mandeti dza British na French. Vhaimeli vha Nationalism ya Vhaarabu vho vhenga vhulanga vhuhu ha vhannḓa na mikano ye ya olwa nga Vhayuropa, nahone vha ṱahela u lwa na u dzula ha Zionism ngei Palestine.

Muvhuya wo swika nṱha-nṱha nga fhasi ha **Gamal Abdel Nasser** wa Egypt. Musi Nasser a tshi **ita Suez Canal ya muvhuso nga 1956** (nationalise) nahone a lwa na u dzhenelela ha British, French na Israel, o vha muhali kha shango ḽoṱhe ḽa Vhaarabu na tshiga tsha mivhuya ya u lwa na vhukoloni kha Afurika na Asia yoṱhe.

items: Yo fhaṱwa kha luambo lwa Luarabu, mvelele na (kha vhanzhi) Islam zwo fanaho.
**Pan-Arabism** yo lora u ṱanganya Vhaarabu vhoṱhe, ya ṱanganya Egypt na Syria lwa tshifhinganyana nga 1958.
Yo vha i tshi lwa na vhukoloni nga maanḓa nahone ya ṱuṱuwedza nndwa dza mbofholowo dza Vhaafurika.

media.alt: Tsimbi (cheini) yo vunḓekanaho nṱha ha khanele yo pfanyekiswaho, i imela Nationalism ya Vhaarabu ya u lwa na vhukoloni na Suez Crisis.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='104' y='30' width='32' height='108' fill='#4f7fae'/><g fill='none' stroke='#2f5233' stroke-width='7'><circle cx='72' cy='58' r='14'/><circle cx='96' cy='72' r='14'/></g><g fill='none' stroke='#2f5233' stroke-width='7'><circle cx='168' cy='58' r='14'/><circle cx='144' cy='72' r='14'/></g><line x1='108' y1='66' x2='132' y2='66' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='6' stroke-dasharray='4 5'/></svg>

slides.notes: Sumbedzani Nationalism ya Vhaarabu sa muṅwe muvhuya wa u lwa na vhukoloni, une wa vhofhanya tshiitea tsha Middle East na Afurika (thero ya CAPS i katela zwoṱhe zwivhili). Nasser na Suez 1956 ndi tshiga tsha ndeme: maanḓa maṱuku a tshi lwa na vhalanga vha kale vha vhukoloni zwo vusa shango ḽe ḽa vha ḽi tshi bva kha vhukoloni, u katela na Afurika ya fhasi ha Sahara. Ṱhogomelani u sa pfana vhukati ha Nationalism ya Vhaarabu ha vhuthihi ha pan-Arab na mivhuso yo fhambanaho, na uri u lwa na Zionism ho vha tshiṅwe tsha zwiitisi zwa u ṱanganya. Kwamani nungo dza u lwa na vhukoloni na Nationalism ya Vhaafurika ye ya gudiwa nga phanḓa.

slides.title: Dzi-Nationalism mbili, mavu maṅwe
slides.lead: U fana na Afurika Tshipembe, Middle East yo vhona dzi-Nationalism mbili dzi tshi ambela shango ḽithihi.

items: Phindulo kha anti-Semitism ya Yuropa na Holocaust.
Ya mutupo-vhurabeli: hayani ha vhathu vha Vhayuda.
Ndivho: muvhuso wa Vhayuda wo tsireledzeaho ngei Palestine.
Yo wana vhuvhuso nga 1948 (Israel).
U bvelela hayo ho pfulusa vhadzulapo vha Vhaarabu vha Palestine.
Phindulo kha u wa ha Ottoman na vhuvhusi ha vhukoloni ha Yuropa.
Yo thewa kha luambo lwa Luarabu na mvelele zwo fanaho.
Ndivho: mbofholowo na (kha vhaṅwe) vhuthihi ha Vhaarabu.
Yo swika nṱha na Nasser na Suez Crisis ya 1956.
Yo lwa na Zionism nahone ya ṱuṱuwedza Afurika ya u lwa na vhukoloni.

slides.notes: Itani ngudo ya vhambedzo i fanaho na ya sileidi ya Afurika Tshipembe. Nga zwenezwo itani vhukwamani vhukati ha zwiitea vhu vhe khagala: Afurika Tshipembe na Palestine zwoṱhe zwi sumbedza dzi-Nationalism mbili dzi tshi kwamana nga mavu maṅwe, dzi tshi bveledza khani ndapfu, i vhaisaho. Vhudzisani vhagudiswa uri vha vhambedze hu si fhedzi Zionism na Nationalism ya Vhaarabu, fhedzi na Nationalism ya Vhaafrikaner na Zionism (zwoṱhe zwivhili ndi vhathu vhaṱuku vha ṱoḓaho tsireledzo na vhulanga) na Nationalism ya Vhaafurika na Nationalism ya Vhaarabu (mivhuya mivhili ya vhathu vhanzhi ya u lwa na vhukoloni). Uyu muvhambedzo wa masia maṋa ndi wone vhukuma ha u humbula ha nṱha hune CAPS ya vhu lambedza.

slides.title: Nationalism: maanḓa ane a ṱanganya na u fhandekanya
slides.lead: Kha zwiitea zwoṱhe zwiṋa, Nationalism yo ṋea vhathu vhuḓiimiswa na mbofholowo - nahone ya ola mikano ye ya isa kha khani.

blocks.alt: Laini ya tshifhinga ya zwiitea zwihulwane zwa Nationalism u bva 1897 u swika 1958 kha Afurika Tshipembe na Middle East.

events.label: SANNC (nga murahu ANC) yo thomiwa Afurika Tshipembe
Balfour Declaration nga ha 'hayani ya lushaka' ya Vhayuda
ANC Youth League i khwaṱhisa Nationalism ya Vhaafurika
National Party i kunda maanḓa; State of Israel yo ḓivhadzwa / Nakba
Nasser na Suez Crisis: nṱha-nṱha ha Nationalism ya Vhaarabu

slides.notes: Khwaṱhisani nga iyi laini ya tshifhinga yo ṱanganelanaho uri vhagudiswa vha vhone mivhuya miṋa i tshi bvela phanḓa kha tshifhinga tshithihi, i tshi kwama iṅwe na iṅwe (u lwa na vhukoloni ho phaḓaladza mihumbulo u pfuka mikano). Sumbedzani khaṱhulo ya u fhedza: Nationalism ndi maanḓa a hasia mbili - yo ṋea nungo mbofholowo kha vhukoloni na apartheid, fhedzi hune tshaka mbili dza ambela mavu maṅwe yo bveledza u dzhielwa zwithu na khani i sa fheli. Ṱhogomelani 1948 sa ṅwaha wa vhukwamani wo swifhaho une wa bvelela kha zwiitea zwivhili zwo fhambanaho nga tshifhinga tshithihi.

slides.title: Musengulusо: u vhambedza dzi-Nationalism
slides.lead: Shumisani fureimiweke ya mbudziso ṱhanu na vhambedzo u fhindula mbudziso dzi re fhasi.

blocks.text: Kha iyi ngudo ro ṱalusa Nationalism, ra fhambanya **civic** na **ethnic** nationalism, ra vhambedza mivhuya miṋa: Nationalism ya **Vhaafrikaner** na ya **Vhaafurika** ngei Afurika Tshipembe, na **Zionism** na Nationalism ya **Vhaarabu** ngei Middle East. Kha zwivhinga zwoṱhe zwivhili dzi-Nationalism mbili dzo ambela mavu maṅwe, na mvelelo dzo swikaho kule.

blocks.question: Ṱalutshedzani phambano vhukati ha civic na ethnic nationalism, ni tshi shumisa tsumbo NTHIHI ya Afurika Tshipembe na NTHIHI ya Middle East.
Vhambedzani mathomo a Nationalism ya Vhaafrikaner na Nationalism ya Vhaafurika. Sumbedzani u fana huvhili na u fhambana huvhili zwa fhasi-fhasi.

'Zwiitea zwa 1948 zwo amba mbofholowo kha lushaka luthihi na u xelelwa kha luṅwe.' Ni tshi shumisa tsumbo ya Afurika Tshipembe KANA ya Israel-Palestine, haseledzani uri tshifhinga tshithihi tsha ḓivhazwakale tshi nga humbulwa hani nga nḓila dzo lwaho.

slides.notes: Shumisani mbudziso tharu sa mushumo wo ṅwaliwaho kana nyambedzano yo dzudzanywaho ya kilasi; u kovhiwa ha marata zwi edzisa mifuda ya CAPS ya u ṅwala ho aluwaho na yo thewaho kha zwiko. Mbudziso ya 3 i linga nga ho livhaho vhukoni ha u pfesesa muhumbulo wo hanedziswaho na kuvhonele, zwine zwa vha mbiluni ya thero iyi. Humbudzani vhagudiswa uri vha tikedze nga vhuṱanzi na u imela sia ḽiṅwe na ḽiṅwe nga u linganela. [SME] Musi ni sa athu linga zwithu zwa Israel/Palestine, vhonani uri nyendedzo ya muhasho nga ha u funza iyi thero yo hanedziswaho yo tevhelwa nahone hu na zwiko zwo fhambanaho.
